creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #4)
"elf_getphdrnum() is identical to elf_getphnum in both implementations (elftoolchain and elfutils)."

Correction: The implementation of elf_getphnum() and elf_getphdrnum() are not quite identical.  The return value for errors is 0 for the former and -1 for the latter.  Same for elf_getshnum() vs elf_getshdrnum() (in both elftoolchain and elfutils).
